entry.title: 随机过程笔记
entry.content: 马尔可夫链(一)马氏性定义$ P(X_{n+1}=j|X_n=i,X_{n-1}=i_{n-1},…,X_1=i_1,X_0=i_0)=P(X_{n+1}=j|X_n=i)=P_{ij} $， 此即将来的状态的条件分布独立于过去的状态，且只依赖于现在的状态 (二)C-K方程(查普曼-科尔莫戈罗夫方程)$P^{n+m}_{ij}=\sum_{k=0}^{\infty}P_{ik}^{n}P_{kj}^{m}$，对于一切 $n,m\geq0$，一切 $i,j$ $\color{red}\it{proof}:$\begin{aligned} P^{n+m}_{ij}&=P\lbrace{X_{n+m}=j|X_0=i}\rbrace\\&=\sum_{k=0}^{\infty}P\lbrace{X_{n+m}=j,X_n=k|X_0=i}\rbrace\\&=\sum_{k=0}^{\infty}P\lbrace{X_{n+m}=j|X_n=k,X_0=i}\rbrace P\lbrace{X_n=k|X_0=i}\rbrace\\&=\sum_{k=0}^{\infty}P_{ik}^{n}P_{kj}^{m} \end{aligned}$P(X\leq t)\leq exp(-t^2/2{\sigma}^2)$$C\sqrt{log(2n)} \sigma$

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
